title: Go Kid Music Club Animal Jam
description: Following last year’s sell-out show, family favourite Go Kid Music Club is back – and this time, the animals are taking over! Animal Jam is a big, joyful live gig for families who love music, nature and fun! Join Brighton’s favourite children’s singer-songwriter Al Start and her excellent Beastie Band for a heart-warming, catchy, animal-inspired set. Sing along to family favourites, discover brand-new songs, and watch your little cubs take over the stage at Brighton’s only Kids’ Open Mic, showing the grown-ups how it’s done! Dress up in animal onesies, costumes, or bring a (stuffed) furry friend – and let’s blow the roof off the Spiegeltent together! Relaxed, inclusive, unforgettable – the ultimate afternoon for primary-age kids and their whole family. The funnest, furriest family gig you’ll find!
